title: Family Breakfast Cafes
shortDesc: Start the day right — Samui's best kid-friendly breakfast spots with Thai and Western options.
description: Finding a genuinely family-friendly breakfast cafe in Samui is easier than you think. Several great spots around Chaweng, Lamai, and Bophut cater brilliantly to families — with high chairs, kid-friendly menus, fresh fruit platters, pancakes, smoothie bowls, and classic Thai breakfast dishes. A relaxed morning meal sets the tone for a great day of adventures.
